$comment: workspace: capstone, dataset: production — Story 23.1 block audit. Block: accordion. Variants: default, bordered, separated, technical. items accordionItem min 1 max 20. AC6 #28 min-items=1 exercised on 'default'.
title: Demo — Accordion

items.title: Only item
items.content: Single-item boundary case for the accordion items array.

blocks.heading: Bordered accordion
blocks.description: Each item has a visible border frame.

items.title: Eligibility
items.content: Seniors enrolled in a participating program are eligible for capstone.

items.title: Selection
items.content: Teams are selected based on fit with sponsor briefs.

items.title: Deliverables
items.content: Each team ships a working product and a public demo.

items.title: Grading rubric
items.content: Rubric weights technical depth, user impact, and presentation quality equally.

items.title: Appeals process
items.content: Grade appeals are reviewed by the faculty steering committee within two weeks.

items.title: Runtime requirements
items.content: Node 20 LTS and up. Bun and Deno are explicitly unsupported for this iteration.

items.title: Deploy target
items.content: Cloudflare Pages with the static Astro adapter.

items.title: Observability
items.content: Sentry for errors, Plausible for analytics, Lighthouse CI for perf regressions.

items.title: Testing
items.content: Vitest for units/schema, Playwright for E2E. CI runs chromium + firefox.
